purpose: Per-quarter FreeNIC refresh ledger. One entry per FFIEC reporting quarter. Each stage is one of: pending | done | na | undocumented, with an ISO ts and a notes string. Maintained by the freenic-refresh skill; canonical on-disk state so a refresh run survives a session/turn boundary (orchestration-cadence rule).
lag_rule: A quarter (period-end YYYY-06-30 etc.) publishes ~75 days after quarter-end. Y-9C/BHCF (bhcf_filings) and some FDIC products trail the Call/UBPR/SDI core by ~1 quarter; acquire whatever is published, record the trailing product as 'pending', and pick it up next run.
reconstruction_tables_rule: B3 addendum (FREENIC11_RECONSTRUCTION_20260715): the reconstruction tables luck_equivalent_panel / luck_core_panel / clean_bank_panel_clv_derived REBUILD after each quarterly refresh via pipeline/scripts/50_reconstruct_luck.py --rebuild (MODC re-derives from the refreshed call_report_filings; MODL is input-static) and pipeline/scripts/51_reconstruct_finhist.py (input-static; --rebuild only if the CLV .dta updates), then gate with pipeline/scripts/52_validate_reconstruction.py. Run AFTER ingest+validate, alongside views_regen. (Ported into this tracked ledger 2026-07-16 by the F2 reconcile; paths updated to the post-restructure pipeline/scripts/ layout.)

2026Q1.backfill_note: Reconstructed honestly from PROGRESS_LOG.md + FREENIC_MASTER_STATE.json + the CDF baseline (FREENIC_10_BASELINE_20260714.md). The 2026Q1 data was loaded 2026-06-01 by the Definitive-Build campaign, BEFORE the freenic-refresh skill existed (skill created 2026-06-12). So this is a retro-attribution, not a skill-driven run.

acquire.notes: Q1 bulk ZIPs on disk: Inputs/cdr_call_bulk/call_single_20260331.zip (5.48 MB, 2026-06-01), Inputs/ubpr_bulk/ubpr_single_20260331.zip (104.5 MB, 2026-06-09). DRY-RUN 2026-07-14: 07d/07g with arg 20260331 both report '[done] nothing to fetch (all present)' -> quarter-detection confirms Q1 already acquired without touching the network.

ingest.notes: call_report_filings 144->201 quarters (1976Q1-2026Q1), +3,207,071 rows non-destructive (07e). ubpr_ratios / ubpr_peer_stats / fdic_financials all at 2026Q1 per baseline. Loaders idempotent (07e skips existing periods; 39_ingest_ubpr.already_loaded() skips loaded period).

validate.notes: 13_validate.py (728 lines, opens get_db(read_only=True)) is the gate; last recorded green run v1.4 2026-06-17 = 477 passed / 0 failed against the live DB. Not re-run in this dry-run (read-only confirmed; full run scans ~4.97B rows).

dictionary_refresh.notes: bank-data-dictionary v10.0 released 2026-06-12 (415c21a); _rebuild/quarterly_refresh.py present with a --dry-run mode; V10_STATE.json phase F 'quarterly_refresh.py dry-run green'. This was the v10 build cycle, not a discrete Q1-triggered refresh; treated as satisfying the Q1 taxonomy side. FreeNIC dict tables pinned to v10.0.

views_regen.notes: 14_import_dictionary -> 15_generate_schedule_views (39 views) all present and last regenerated in the 2026-06-12 dict-sync campaign; dict.* = 7 tables pinned to v10.0, 39 generated views.

coverage_audit.notes: 16_coverage_audit.py PASS: 15,435/15,435 raw variables reachable via >=1 view (dict_variable_access_map). Confirmed in baseline.

site_republish.notes: NOT confirmed for Q1 via the skill. deploy/freenic/build_slice.py exists; hosted push to data.freenic.org is operator-gated (box creds absent on build host) and STAGED per FREENIC_MASTER_STATE.json gate 7. Release label still 'v1.0' while warehouse is v1.4 -> whether the served host reflects the Q1/v1.4 data is UNVERIFIED (baseline gap #3). Mark done only after the operator sync is confirmed.

acquire.notes: Run 07d/07g (in pipeline/scripts/) with 8-digit arg 20260630. FIXED 2026-07-16 (F2 reconcile, C5 fix re-applied post-restructure): 07d QENDS was hardcoded range(2012,2026) (silently no-op'd for 2026+); both 07d & 07g now self-extend to (current year+2, floor 2035) and VALIDATE args via parse_targets() -- a malformed token or out-of-range year ERRORS instead of fetching nothing. Year-arg '2026' now works too, but 8-digit remains the convention. Q2 publishes ~2026-09-13. Y-9C/BHCF likely still trailing at 2026Q1.

dictionary_refresh.notes: cycle 06302026 (quarterly_refresh.py --dry-run already targets it; registry-delta cycle constant in _rebuild/empirical/build_registry_v9.py = 03312026 -> 06302026).
